name: rust-coding
description: Guide the agent in writing idiomatic Rust with strong data modeling and build practices.

interface.shortDescription: Idiomatic Rust guidance for data modeling, traits, macros, and modules.
interface.longDescription: Rust Coding provides practical guidance for Rust projects, including ownership-aware data modeling, trait implementations, module boundaries, documentation, macro usage, and build-speed practices.
defaultPrompt: Make this Rust code more idiomatic.
Help model this Rust state machine.
